arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Tottenham striker transfer, Djed Spence, Solanke and Mikey Moore
arts.sum: The Spurs boss was also quizzed about the need to sign another striker in the coming transfer windows as well as the arrival of South Korean teenager Yang Min-hyeok and the form of his national and club captain Son Heung-min, as well as the latest with Djed Spence and when he might start his first game for the club. What we know is that this year in the Premier League all games are pretty tightly contested and even if a team has had a previous poor performance they are just as likely to bounce back with a strong performance on the weekend.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists it is premature to write off Son Heung-min
arts.sum: Spurs captain Son Heung-min has scored only once from open play in his last 12 appearances.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes feelings clear as Tottenham boss compares Son Heung-min to Mo Salah
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou has likened Son Heung-min’s situation to when there were similar doubts over Liverpool star Mo Salah at the start of the 2022/23 season

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hints at Tottenham striker transfer after huge Jonathan David update
arts.sum: Captain Son Heung-min and new signing Wilson Odobert have also missed significant periods with Postecoglou having to regularly rely on the likes of Brennan Johnson, loannee Timo Werner and academy ace Mikey Moore. Just this past summer, Dominic Solanke joined Spurs from Bournemouth with Richarlison having joined the club in 2022, 12 months before the departure of Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'target' Ligue 1 breakout star but face competition from European giants
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are among the clubs rumoured to be interested in Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov, but face competition from one of their Premier League rivals, as well as a European giant. The article claims Khusanov was signed by Lens for a nominal fee of €100,000 only 18 months ago, and he could now command a fee in the region of £25m.

arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £16.6m star now decides to snub Manchester City, Tottenham and Liverpool in favour of new contract
Tottenham sold a player for £8m this summer who's been scoring more frequently than Heung-min Son this season
Tottenham star Cristian Romero sends six-word message after Ange Postecoglou injury update
arts.sum: Of the group dealing with injuries, Romero looked to be the closest towards a return with Postecoglou later issuing a thorough update on his recovery. Tottenham defender Cristian Romero has posted a heartfelt message on social media following Ange Postecoglou's injury update before his side face Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou drops major hint over club's January transfer plans
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says that his club need to strengthen their attacking department during the January transfer window.
